notes: Structural + contract gates, graded by skill-creator's grader. hf-build authors the composition; it does NOT render (that is hf-render). The gates check that the project lints with 0 errors and honors the composition contract, and that on-screen text is faithful to the upstream storyboard. Assumes 01-concept.md + 03-storyboard.md (and optionally 04-timing.json) already exist in the project. Derived from 1-requirements.md JTBD-1 (composition row), JTBD-2 (data-viz), JTBD-4 (restyle / fact preservation).

evals.name: build-from-storyboard-lints-clean
evals.prompt: Build the composition for the api-rate-limit-teaser project from its storyboard.
expectations: scaffolds artifacts/api-rate-limit-teaser/composition/ from the bundled hf-template (assets/gsap.min.js and assets/fonts.css are present; index.html exists)
`npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.112 lint` on the composition reports 0 errors (a single gsap_studio_edit_blocked warning is acceptable)
the root div has data-composition-id, numeric data-width, data-height, and data-duration; exactly one paused gsap.timeline is registered on window.__timelines
every timed element carries class="clip" plus data-start/data-duration/data-track-index; no two clips on the same track overlap or share a boundary
GSAP loads from the vendored ./assets/gsap.min.js (no cdn.jsdelivr / unpkg / googleapis URL anywhere in the composition); font-family declarations use literal family names, not var()
the composition contains no Math.random, Date.now, performance.now, or repeat: -1
on-screen text matches the storyboard/script beats (no invented facts or numbers)

evals.name: data-viz-values-bound-exactly
evals.prompt: Build the data-viz composition for the q4-revenue project (4 quarterly figures) from its storyboard.
expectations: the composition lints with 0 errors and includes a data-viz scene (counter and/or bar) per the storyboard
the numeric values rendered in the markup exactly equal the input quarterly figures from 03-storyboard.md (no rounded-away or fabricated numbers)
animated numbers use a proxy-object counter written into a tabular-nums element (no digit jitter); bars animate via a transform (scaleX), not by animating width
at least 3 distinct GSAP eases are used across the scenes and every element has an entrance

evals.name: restyle-preserves-facts
evals.prompt: Restyle the api-rate-limit-teaser composition to a bolder, darker look at 9:16 (1080x1920) without changing the message.
expectations: re-authors composition/ in place (or re-scaffolds with --force); the root is now 1080x1920 and still lints with 0 errors
the on-screen headline text and any numbers are byte-identical to the prior version (facts unchanged on a restyle)
the palette/typography changed toward the requested bolder/darker direction (different accent and/or heavier display font) while the contract still holds
02-script.md and 03-storyboard.md are unchanged (a restyle re-runs build only, never the script)
